# Petroleum Engineering

**Summary**: The branch of engineering concerned with the production of oil and gas from wells.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1999-iddris|Iddris, 1999]] applied petroleum engineering principles to evaluate sand consolidation risks.

- [[1995-al-jaziri|Al-Jaziri, 1995]] focused on solving production issues related to water-in-oil emulsions.

- [[1993-kandil|Kandil, 1993]] applied petroleum-engineering principles to optimize well design.

- [[1995-al-khamis|Al-Khamis, 1995]] focused on petroleum engineering by evaluating Z-factor calculation methods for gas systems.
